all.en: Every Saturday morning, my brother and I head to the public basketball court near our apartment.
all.zh: 每個星期六早上，我和哥哥都會前往我們公寓附近的公共籃球場。

all.en: The court is usually crowded with players of different ages and skill levels.
all.zh: 球場上通常擠滿了年齡和技術水平各異的球員。

all.en: Anyone who wants to join simply shouts out and waits for the next game.
all.zh: 任何想加入的人只要喊一聲，然後等下一場比賽就行了。

all.en: Last weekend, we were teamed up with three strangers we had never met before.
all.zh: 上週末，我們與三位素昧平生的陌生人組成了一隊。

all.en: One of them was a tall college student with an impressive jump shot.
all.zh: 其中一位是身材高大的大學生，跳投相當厲害。

all.en: At the beginning, our team struggled to communicate because nobody knew each other's names.
all.zh: 一開始，由於彼此都不認識名字，我們這隊很難溝通。

all.en: After a few possessions, we developed simple hand signals to call for passes.
all.zh: 幾個回合後，我們發展出簡單的手勢來示意傳球。

all.en: The other team played aggressive defense and tried to steal the ball constantly.
all.zh: 對方球隊採用了積極的防守，並不斷試圖抄截球權。

all.en: In the final minute, I made a difficult three-pointer to win the game.
all.zh: 在最後一分鐘，我投進了一個高難度的三分球贏得比賽。

all.en: Everyone cheered and gave each other high fives despite being completely soaked in sweat.
all.zh: 儘管每個人都被汗水浸濕，大家還是歡呼著互相擊掌。

all.en: Pickup games at the park have become my favorite way to relax and meet new people.
all.zh: 在公園打野球已經成為我最喜歡的放鬆方式和結識新朋友的方法。

all.en: The following Saturday, we returned to the park hoping to play with the same teammates.
all.zh: 接下來的星期六，我們回到公園，希望能和同樣的隊友一起打球。

all.en: The tall college student greeted us with a friendly nod and a fresh new basketball.
all.zh: 那位高大的大學生用友善的點頭和一顆全新的籃球向我們打招呼。

all.en: This time, we agreed to play a longer match of first team to twenty-one points.
all.zh: 這次我們同意打一場較長的比賽，先得二十一分的隊伍獲勝。

all.en: My brother showed great improvement and made several quick passes under heavy defense.
all.zh: 我哥哥進步神速，在嚴密的防守下完成了好幾次快速傳球。

all.en: During a water break, we exchanged phone numbers and joined a group chat together.
all.zh: 在喝水休息時間，我們交換了電話號碼，並一起加入了一個群組聊天。

all.en: An elderly neighbor sat on a bench and watched the whole game with great interest.
all.zh: 一位年長的鄰居坐在長椅上，興致勃勃地觀看了整場比賽。

all.en: He even shouted helpful tips when our defense became loose around the basket.
all.zh: 當我們的籃下防守變得鬆散時，他甚至大聲喊出有用的建議。

all.en: After the game ended, we treated everyone to cold sports drinks from a vending machine.
all.zh: 比賽結束後，我們請大家喝了自動販賣機買的冰涼運動飲料。

all.en: My brother suggested forming a regular weekend team to compete in city tournaments.
all.zh: 我哥哥提議組成一支固定的週末球隊，去參加城市的籃球賽。

all.en: What began as casual pickup games may soon turn into something more meaningful.
all.zh: 原本只是隨興的野球比賽，可能很快就會發展成更有意義的事。

all.en: Word of our growing weekend team quickly spread to other regular players around the neighborhood.
all.zh: 我們這支日漸壯大的週末球隊的消息很快傳遍了社區裡其他的常客球員。

all.en: A retired physical education teacher offered free coaching sessions on Wednesday evenings after his daily walk.
all.zh: 一位退休的體育老師提議在週三晚上他每日散步後免費幫我們做指導訓練。

all.en: He focused on team passing drills and improving our court awareness during fast transitions.
all.zh: 他著重於團隊傳球練習，並提升我們在快速攻防轉換時的場上意識。

all.en: Within a month, our chemistry on the court reached a level none of us had imagined.
all.zh: 不到一個月，我們在場上的默契達到了大家都未曾想像的程度。

all.en: We registered as an official team for the upcoming district amateur basketball tournament next spring.
all.zh: 我們以正式球隊身份報名了明年春天即將舉行的地區業餘籃球錦標賽。

all.en: My brother designed simple team jerseys with our chosen name printed across the back.
all.zh: 我哥哥設計了簡單的隊服，把我們選定的隊名印在背後。

all.en: The elderly neighbor proudly volunteered to become our unofficial assistant coach and trusted advisor.
all.zh: 那位年長的鄰居自豪地自願擔任我們的非正式助理教練和值得信賴的顧問。

all.en: During our first tournament match, nerves caused us to miss several easy shots in the opening quarter.
all.zh: 在第一場錦標賽比賽中，緊張讓我們在開賽第一節錯失了好幾個輕鬆的投籃。

all.en: The coach calmly reminded us to trust our practice and play the game we already knew.
all.zh: 教練平靜地提醒我們要相信平時的練習，並打出我們早已熟悉的比賽。

all.en: We came back strongly and advanced to the next round, hugging at the final buzzer.
all.zh: 我們強勢逆轉，並晉級到下一輪，在終場哨聲響起時相互擁抱。
